name: codex-reference-repos
description: Sync project reference repositories into a local cache for Codex to inspect.

interface.shortDescription: Use checked-in reference repos as local Codex context.
interface.longDescription: Codex Reference Repos prepares project-declared Git repositories in an OS cache so Codex can inspect them as read-only implementation references.
defaultPrompt: Use the reference repos to study this feature.
Add a reference repo for this project.
